title: U.S. senators seek to block foreign adversaries from AI technology in new bill
summary: Senators Tim Scott and Bill Hagerty, who managed to push the crypto GENIUS Act into law, introduced the bill to give the government powers to defend U.S. AI.

title: Trump pocketed more than $1 billion from crypto ties as industry headed toward slump
summary: The president has capitalized massively on crypto, according to his 2025 financial disclosure, making it one of his most lucrative business moves.

title: Phantom doubles down on perpetual futures with hire of Hyperliquid market builders
summary: The crypto wallet is doubling down on perpetual futures after hiring the builders behind one of Hyperliquid's highest-profile market experiments.

title: Companies spending the most on AI are growing jobs, Ramp study finds
summary: A new study from Ramp found companies making the biggest investments in AI are expanding their workforces, with heavy adopters increasing headcount by about 10% and entry-level hiring by 12%, challenging fears that generative AI is already causing widespread job losses.

title: Why OpenUSD's 'real threat' that tanked Circle stock still faces a steep uphill battle for adoption
summary: The Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium can challenge Circle's business model, but analysts say building a network is harder than assembling big-name partners.
